type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Chromic acid is added to the anodize tank approximately once every 2 years, one addition made in 2011, no additions in 2010. Calculations by mass balance reflect these variances.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: MEK used as a cleaning solvent prior to aircraft painting has been substituted with an alternate chemical in late 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Substitution of MEK as a cleaning solvent prior to aircraft painting means on-site recycling of MEK will no longer occur.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Maintenance problems with degreaser caused increased usage of trichloroethylene in 2011. Material substitution for trichloroethylene was made in late 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Maintenance problems with degreaser caused increased usage and disposal of trichloroethylene in 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Chromic acid is added to the anodize tank approximately once every 2 years, one addition made in 2011, no additions in 2010. Calculations by mass balance reflect these variances.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More accurate estimation method used as a result of updating information for renewal of Environmental Compliance Approval for Air.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Added cooling tower data not previously reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Increase in off spec solvent for disposal

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Actual emisson rates to air for the chromic acid anodize process have been measured as part of the Environment Canada Chromium Anodizing Regulation. Measured emission rates are used to calculate annual releases for this process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Not all Cr (3+) is converted to Cr (6+) prior to disposal, new estimates reflect this.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Not all Cr(3+) is converted to Cr(6+) prior to release

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Did not take into account conversion from Cr(3+) to Cr(6+) is approximately 80%.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: An error was discovered in the paint quantities provided by suppliers. Some quantities were for the Montreal and Toronto facilities not just Toronto.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Implemented solvent recycling equipment Dec 2005

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Used mass balance to calculate quantity disposed. Total chromium inputs were 317 Kg (from purchasing data) less quantity emitted to atmosphere (88 Kg) = 229 Kg. 
Lat years data reported the total weight of chromium containing sludge for chromium disposal

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Used engineering calculations to estimate worse case scenario for emissions to air from chemical process tanks. This source was overlooked in last years submission.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Main vapour degreaser was decomissioned. Converted to alkaline cleaning.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Decomissioned main vapour degreaser, eliminated most vapour degreasing activities by conversion to alkaline cleaning process. 
Releases do not meet NPRI reporting requirements, reporting for information purposes only due to the history of the facility re

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: Facility is being shut down and relocated, prevention activities are currently on hold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The commercial aircraft division was sold and vacated the site in 2021, as a result aircraft painting and chemical processing are no longer performed. The facility is also being decommissioned and moved to a new location. These factors have resulted in a net decrease of reportable contaminants.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Facility is in the process of shutting down operations and moving to a new location, as a result some processes have been eliminated and overall emissions are down from previous years.
